title: Suspicious Crosshair
description: Change your in-game crosshair to become Sus!
body:
Change your crosshair to a suspicious little guy!

May also work for later versions (tried and tested on  1.21.10)

Any issues at all please let me know, thank you! Enjoy!

![In-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ca3672c0f5ca78960a60de7cc495e08ad5c3b3.jpeg)
